zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwick於1350年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安迪萊頓時，她的父親Walter Halyburton36歲，母親Isabella25歲。她和Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholm至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1400年在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwick was born in 1350, in Dirleton, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Walter Halyburton, was 36 and her mother, Isabella, was 25. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholm. She died in 1400, in Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwick est née en 1350, à Dirleton, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Halyburton, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Isabella, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholm. Elle est décédée en 1400, à Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

Sie hatte mit Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholm mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1400 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwickが1350年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンディルレトンで生まれた時，父Walter Halyburtonは36歳，母Isabellaは25歳であった。彼女はSir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholmとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1400年にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwick(이)가 1350년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 디를레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Halyburton(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholm(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.
